debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
hf : UnifContOn f (Set.Icc a b)
ε : ℝ
hε : 0 < ε
δ : ℝ
hδ₁ : δ > 0
hδ₂ : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε / (2 * (b - a))
N : ℕ
hN : 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < ↑N
n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
m : ℕ
hnm : m ≥ n
pos1 : 0 < 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))
NposR : 0 < ↑N
Npos : 0 < N
npos : 0 < n
mpos : 0 < m
hn_small : 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ
⊢ 2 * (b - a) / ↑m < δ

proof:
apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left
  · bound
  · bound
  · exact_mod_cast hnm
failed_attempts:
rw [div_lt_iff (by bound)]
  simp only [one_div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN
  calc 2 * (b - a) < δ * N := by linarith
    _ ≤ δ * m := by
      apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
      · exact_mod_cast le_trans hn hnm
      · bound

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
  · apply inv_le_inv_of_le
    · bound
    · exact_mod_cast hnm
  · bound

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
  · apply inv_le_inv_of_le (by bound)
    exact_mod_cast hnm
  · bound

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left
  · linarith
  · bound
  · exact_mod_cast hnm

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_le_left <;> bound

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left
  · linarith
  · exact_mod_cast npos
  · exact_mod_cast hnm

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
  · exact inv_le_inv_of_le (by exact_mod_cast npos) (by exact_mod_cast hnm)
  · linarith [hab]

rw [div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by linarith), mul_comm]
  calc 2 * (b - a) < ↑N * δ := (div_lt_iff hδ₁).mp hN
    _ ≤ ↑m * δ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (by linarith) (le_of_lt hδ₁)

field_simp at hN ⊢
  rw [div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN
  calc
    2 * (b - a) < N * δ := hN
    _ ≤ m * δ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (by norm_cast; linarith [hn, hnm]) (by bound)

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  rw [div_le_div_left (by bound) (by bound) (by bound)]
  exact_mod_cast hnm

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left
  · linarith
  · exact_mod_cast npos
  · exact_mod_cast hnm

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left
  · linarith
  · exact_mod_cast hnm
  · exact_mod_cast npos

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left
  · linarith
  · bound
  · exact_mod_cast hnm

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left
  · linarith
  · exact_mod_cast npos
  · exact_mod_cast hnm

rw [div_div, div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound)]
  apply lt_of_lt_of_le hN
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ (le_of_lt hδ₁)
  norm_cast; linarith

field_simp at hN ⊢
  linarith [hn, hnm]

field_simp at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound), ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]
  exact hN.trans_le (by norm_cast; linarith)

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
  · apply inv_le_inv_of_le (by exact_mod_cast npos) (by exact_mod_cast hnm)
  · linarith

rw [div_div] at hN
  have hN' : 2 * (b - a) / N < δ := by rwa [div_lt_iff hδ₁, mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff NposR] at hN
  refine lt_of_le_of_lt ?_ hN'
  apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by linarith [hab]) NposR
  exact_mod_cast le_trans hn hnm

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_le_left (by bound) (by bound)
  norm_cast
  exact hnm

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left
  · linarith
  · linarith
  · norm_cast; assumption

rw [one_div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast mpos)]
  refine lt_of_lt_of_le hN ?_
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ hδ₁.le
  norm_cast
  linarith

rw [one_div_div, div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff mpos]
  calc 2 * (b - a) < ↑N * δ := hN
    _ ≤ ↑m * δ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (by norm_cast; linarith) (le_of_lt hδ₁)

rw [div_div] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast mpos)]
  apply lt_of_lt_of_le ((div_lt_iff hδ₁).mp hN)
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right
  · exact_mod_cast le_trans hn hnm
  · linarith

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_le_left (by bound) npos
  exact_mod_cast hnm

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by linarith) (by exact_mod_cast npos) (by exact_mod_cast hnm)

field_simp at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by bound), mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]
  linarith

rw [div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast mpos), mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]
  apply lt_of_lt_of_le
  · rwa [one_div_div] at hN
  · exact_mod_cast le_trans hn hnm

field_simp at hN ⊢
  linarith [hn, hnm]

rw [div_div] at hN
  have : 2 * (b - a) / δ < m := lt_of_lt_of_le hN (by norm_cast; linarith)
  rwa [div_lt_iff mpos, mul_comm, ← div_lt_iff hδ₁]
successful_attempts:
apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left
  · bound
  · bound
  · exact_mod_cast hnm

apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn_small
  apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left
  · bound
  · bound
  · exact_mod_cast hnm
